title: Performance of My Pine Script Trading Bot Over the Past Week - Dec 30 (24) - Jan 3 (25)
author: Greedy_Usual_439
selftext:
Hello everyone.   
  
If you all remember I posted about my trading bot, here: [Reddit Post](https://www.reddit.com/r/Trading/comments/1hhzpna/i_built_a_profitable_consistent_trading_bot/). I have been updating on results for the second week now and will continue to do so every weekend (Saturdays/Sundays)

With that being said, I wanted to update those who are interested to know about it's progress in the past week of **Dec 30 (24) - Jan 3 (25)**:

**Dec 30**:  
P&L: $402  
\# of Trades: 11  
Biggest Drawdown: $134

**Dec 31**:  
P&L: $1,072  
\# of Trades: 19  
Biggest Drawdown: $0

**Jan 1**: Holiday

**Jan 2**:  
P&L: $268  
\# of Trades: 24  
Biggest Drawdown: $469

**Jan 3**:  
P&L: $0  
\# of Trades: 7  
Biggest Drawdown: $0

**TOTALS**:  
P&L: $1,742  
Fees: 61 trades x $3.84 ($1.92/order) = $234.24  
Total P&L: $1,507.76  
Average # of Trades/Day: 15

**Notes**: We had New Year so the market was closed and this data is based on 4/5 trading days while ADX was below 23 and time was between 10:30am-2:30pm EST. These trades are taken with 3 MNQ contracts.

If this is interesting and you want to follow on it live. I stream how the bot runs, and answer questions every market day, here: [YT Channel](https://www.youtube.com/@LivePropFirmTrading)
